div1.entryFree: Debate, subst. contest, quarrel: for thee against myself I'll vow d., for I must ne'er love him whom thou dost hate, Sonn. 89, 13. lost in the world's d. LLL I, 1, 174. this same progeny of evils comes from our d., from our dissension, Mids. II, 1, 116. this d. that bleedeth at our doors, H4B IV, 4, 2. I am no further your enemy; she is not worth our d. Cymb. I, 4, 173.
